title: clerodendrum godefroyi
intro: Clerodendrum godefroyi, also known as Godfrey's glory bower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It is native to Madagascar and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and providing relief from digestive problems. The leaves and stems of the Clerodendrum godefroyi plant are typically used in herbal preparations, often made into teas, infusions, or extracts for medicinal purposes.
